sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) produce, as of the earth, Jos 5:12 of the corn-floor, Num 18:30 of the winepress, ibid.; of the vineyard, Deu 22:9.

(2) gain, profits. תְּבוּאַת הָרָשָׁע the profit of the wicked, Pro 10:16 15:6 תְּבוּאַת חָכְמָה gain resulting from wisdom, Pro 3:14 8:19 Isa 23:3.

(3) metaph. fruit, result. תְּבוּאַת שְׂפָתָיו the fruit, result of his words, Pro 18:20. Compare פְּרִי No. 1.
